about.title: Australia's Leading Wholesale IPTV Reseller Panels
about.desc1: Fox IPTV Panels is the leading white-label platform for Australian IPTV credit distribution, serving over 5,000 active business partners across Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, and globally. We consolidate 22 top-tier IPTV streaming networks under a single unified dashboard system, allowing you to launch and brand your own subscription business with zero background infrastructure.
about.desc2: Our geo-distributed networks deliver lag-free, high-definition streaming optimized for major Australian ISPs such as Telstra, Optus, and TPG, guaranteeing a premium viewing experience for your end users.

faq.title: Australia Wholesale IPTV Reseller FAQ
faq.q1: Are your IPTV reseller panels available in Australia?
faq.a1: Yes, absolutely. We support IPTV resellers across Australia with high-speed local peering, AUD payment options, and geo-targeted streaming content suited for Australian viewers.
faq.q2: How do IPTV reseller credits work in Australia?
faq.a2: Reseller credits act as currency in your dashboard. 1 credit provides 1 month of subscription for 1 user. You purchase credits wholesale in AUD and set your own retail prices, keeping 100% of the markup profit.
